items.claim: Patty Pimblett leaves his chin exposed when he strikes.
items.quote: Patty obviously throws his chin up in the air and tries to catch people with these big hooks and against the fence he'll throw his chin up in the air.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has sloppy striking entries.
items.quote: Ben W sloppy with his entries

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is currently suffering from a staph infection.
items.quote: apparently he's got staff this week and stuff like that.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has issues with his cardio.
items.quote: We've seen that him have an issue with that and his cardio.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis squares up too much when he strikes.
items.quote: I think he just squares up a little bit too much on his striking.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett is highly proficient at jumping on guillotine chokes.
items.quote: Patty is very comfortable jumping on those guillotine front chokes and stuff like that.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett lacks the ability to secure submissions off his back in the current era.
items.quote: It's 2026. He's not subbing off his back.
